title: When I'm Young
tmdbOverview: 70-year-old Malena gets a second chance at life when she magically turns into her 22-year-old self. Now, posing as "Maria" to hide her true identity, she becomes the lead singer of her grandson's band and tries to recover her dream of singing, which she had to give up at some point.
synopsis: When I'm Young is a 2022 comedy and fantasy film from United States. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
